coachmarkStep1Body: Up to three recent posts will be displayed. The numbers are updated in real-time and the increase since your last visit to the Dashboard is shown in blue text.
coachmarkStep1Title: Up to three recent posts will be displayed.
coachmarkStep2Body: Other content will be displayed, making it easier for you to get feedback on your work, as well as finding new content recommended for you. This content changes regularly.
coverHint: If you don't set a cover, a thumbnail of the first episode will be used instead.
deleteArtworkConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
deleteSeriesConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
emptySeriesTitle: Try creating a series and use it to collect your works
heroDescription: Track your works, reactions, and performance at a glance.
maxTags: You can use up to 10 tags.
noBookmarks: You haven't received any bookmarks yet
noComments: You haven't received any comments yet
noLikes: You haven't received any likes yet
noMatchingTag: No matching tag. Press Space/Enter to create new tag.
noWorks: You haven't posted any works yet.
